name: California Skillet
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown the meat and onion. Remove any excess fat.
2. Add all remaining ingredients to the skillet, except the cheese. Stir gently.
3. Cover and simmer for 20-30 minutes, or until the macaroni is tender.
4. Uncover the pan and sprinkle with cheese. Stir well.
5. Continue cooking until the cheese is melted.
